title: Teamsterz Mean Machines Fire Engine | Fire Truck Toy With Realistic Lights & Sounds | Firefighter Emergency Rescue Truck Toys | Extendable Fire Ladder | Educational Toys | For Ages 3+
description: Product Description Teamsterz - Mean Machines Fire Engine Introducing the ultimate firefighting adventure for your little one. This thrilling and action-packed toy is designed to ignite your child's imagination and bring heroic rescue missions to life. With the extendable ladder that can get to all those tricky places, you can ensure your child leaves no one behind. Whether it's battling imaginary blazes, rescuing stranded toys, or coming to the aid of their favourite action figures, the Fire Engine offers endless possibilities. Rescue civilians in danger with the Mean Machines Fire Truck. This futuristic ‘jet powered’ fire engine features an extendable, 360-degrees rotating ladder and free-moving wheels. Press the button to activate blue flashing lights, emergency sirens, engine sounds and music. Aiding the development of your childs cognitive and motor skills this is the perfect size for push along play. The Fire Engine is the perfect gift for any little drivers, offering hours of imaginative fun. SUITABLE FOR AGES 3+ LIGHTS & SOUNDS The Light and Sounds range from Teamsterz is perfect for some sensory play with any child. Our Mean Machine range offers realistic flashing lights and siren noises your little one can learn everything they need to know about our emergency services. Early learning is not complete without pretend play and the more imaginative play your child has, the more their creativity and imagination will grow. The ideal gift for any child interested in the Fire Service. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Includes 1x Teamsterz Mean Machine Light & Sound Fire Engine Truck Toy. Requires 3x AAA Batteries (Please note these are included). Product Dimensions - H16cm x W12cm x D30cm. Suitable for all children aged 3+. TEAMSTERZ RANGE The Teamsterz Range offers an extensive range of collectable die-cast vehicles from their Monster Moverz Transporters, Emergency City and their Metro City range. Learning is made possible by the Teamsterz Range by interacting with their realistic light and sound vehicles. . We also want children to explore the world around them and find adventure in their own home and garden, so Teamsterz also offers a wide range of playsets, garages and track sets.
